text: Artificial intelligence is increasingly common in workplaces around the world. One major benefit is automation, which allows AI to handle repetitive tasks like data entry or scheduling. This frees up employees to focus on more creative and complex work. Many companies now use AI-powered productivity tools, such as smart email assistants or project management software, to help teams work more efficiently. However, AI is not replacing humans entirely; instead, human-AI collaboration is becoming the norm. For example, a doctor might use AI to analyze medical scans but still make the final decision. As a result, many jobs are changing rather than disappearing, requiring workers to learn new skills and adapt.
